    <h2 {...{
      "id": "datastream"
    }}>{`Datastream`}</h2>

    <p>{`To route Content Analytics to a different datastream:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "edge.configId": "main-datastream-id",

}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`If `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`contentanalytics.configId`}</inlineCode>{` is not set, the default `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`edge.configId`}</inlineCode>{` is used.`}</p>

      "id": "batching"

      <li parentName="ul">{`App backgrounds.`}</li>

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "contentanalytics.batchingEnabled": true,
  "contentanalytics.maxBatchSize": 10,
  "contentanalytics.batchFlushInterval": 2000
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`To disable flushes for immediate sends:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{ "contentanalytics.batchingEnabled": false }
`}</code></pre>

    <p>{`Batching only affects network delivery. Features like asset attribution, experience tracking, and featurization work the same whether batching is enabled or disabled.`}</p>

    <p>{`An example of a regex that filters out URLs.`}</p>

`}</code></pre>
